/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgstspeedflow.so -o libgstspeedflow.so CMakeFiles/gstspeedflow.dir/src/gst_speedflow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gstspeedflow.dir/src/speed_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gstspeedflow.dir/src/homography.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gstspeedflow.dir/src/plate_associator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gstspeedflow.dir/src/metadata_utils.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream/lib: -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lopencv_gapi -lopencv_highgui -lopencv_ml -lopencv_objdetect -lopencv_photo -lopencv_stitching -lopencv_video -lopencv_calib3d -lopencv_features2d -lopencv_dnn -lopencv_flann -lopencv_videoio -lopencv_imgcodecs -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_core -lyaml-cpp -lnvds_meta -lnvdsgst_meta -lnvdsgst_helper -lnvbufsurface -lnvbufsurftransform /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librt.a
